title: olfersia sorbifolia
intro: Olfersia sorbifolia, also known as the sorrel tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Olfersia sorbifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and its leaves and bark can also be used in poultices for topical application.
